name: libarray-intspan-perl
title: libarray-intspan-perl
summary: Handles arrays of scalars or objects using integer ranges as index
description:
Handles arrays of scalars or objects using integer ranges as index
Array::IntSpan brings the speed advantages of Set::IntSpan to
arrays. Uses include manipulating grades, routing tables, or any other
situation where you have mutually exclusive ranges of integers that
map to given values.
.
Array::IntSpan is also able to consolidate ranges
by comparing the adjacent values of the range. If 2 adjacent values
are identical, the 2 adjacent ranges are merged.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libarray-intspan-perl because Handles arrays of scalars or objects using integer ranges as index.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libarray-intspan-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libarray-intspan-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libarray-intspan-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
